package rulecoverage

func NegativeGormLockingClausesBuiltOutsideRepository() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_locking_clauses_built_outside_repository"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`FOR UPDATE` or similar locking behavior built in handlers or services instead of repository-owned methods."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
